title: Chromalux
description: A dynamic lighting system that shifts colors and affects the environment, creating a nightclub-like visual effect in the game world.
body:
A redstone-only lighting system that operates within a limited 10×10×10 block area. Redstone is used solely to turn the lamp on or off, while the player can manually adjust the speed of the color changes via right-click. The environment inside that space is visually altered, creating eye-catching, immersive, nightclub-like effects without impacting the rest of the world.
